features: WELCOME LONG-LASTING PERFUME QUALITY FRESHNESS: With Old Spice Shower Gel & Shampoo deep cleansing technology and perfume quality scents, you’ll enjoy freshness from head-to-toe
TRY THE PERFUME QUALITY SCENT OF OLD SPICE CAPTAIN: The fragrance of fierce ocean waves, sandalwood and zesty bergamot transforms you into a fearless captain of freshness
DEEP-CLEANSING AND A SMOOTH SKIN FEELING. Level up your shower gel game! Not only does the 3-in-1 shower gel wash away odour, but it also leaves your skin feeling smooth and soft
CLEANSE EVERYTHING: BODY, HAIR, FACE with Old Spice time-saving, bag-friendly body wash for men
PUMP UP THE FRESHNESS WITH THE EXTRA XL 1 Liter bottle. More days of perfume quality long lasting freshness and a convenient pump, so easy anyone can pump it
description: Product Description Enjoy unforgettable Long Lasting Freshness and smelltastic confidence with Old Spice Captain Shower Gel & Shampoo for men. With its deep cleansing formula and perfume quality scents, it drop-kicks dirt and odour, leaving you fresh and clean. This multi-use 3-in-1 formula works on body, hair and face, leaving your skin feeling irresistibly smooth, so you can focus on higher pursuits like closing deals or teaching dolphins to speak. The Perfume Quality Fragrance of fierce ocean waves, sandalwood, and zesty bergamot transforms you into a fearless captain of freshness on a wild adventure through the seven seas of swagger. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Sodium Salicylate, Citric Acid, Linalool, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide, Hexyl Cinnamal, Citronellol, CI 42090, CI 17200 Directions Apply to wet skin and hair, lather, and rinse thoroughly. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more

specifications_table.Benefits: DÜFTE IN PARFÜMQUALITÄT: Der Duft von tosenden Meereswellen, Sandelholz und spritziger Bergamotte, verwandelt dich in einen furchtlosen Kapitän der Frische, EASY! Wasche alles: Haare, Körper, Gesicht mit unserem zeitsparenden, handlichen Körpershampoo für Männer, EINZIGARTIGES DUSCHERLEBNIS: das tiefenreinigende Duschgel reinigt nicht nur, sondern erfrischt Körper und Haare gleichzeitigt mit unwiderstehlichem, manntastischen Duft, GANZ ODER GAR NICHT: Teste die XXLLL-Größe, für mehr Tage anhaltende Frische in Parfümqualität, GENIESSE LAAANGANHALTENDE FRISCHE: von Kopf bis Fuß mit der Tiefenreinigungs-Technologie, RECYCLE MICH: Die Rettung der Welt ist erst der Anfang, also recycel die Verpackung, SAUBER & SANFT: Für ein sauberes, sanftes und geschmeidiges Hautgefühl
